notes: The ball's floor-impact sound (R-SYS-006): a DCC-imported clip (R-ASSET-001) routed to the Sound Effects bus (game-mix.audio-bus.json id ac936623e44e8bfb), triggered at the ball's position each time the gameplay impact system records a bounce, attenuated by listener distance. Fired on miniaudio's NULL backend in the headless smoke gate, off the deterministic sim path (R-SIM-001).
